title: Medicare Information/Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Medicare Information/Counseling 46 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER NETWORK SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 1 West Main Street Suite 303 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 857-7780 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 1036 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 678-5483 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access benefits and services earned through military service and provided by the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and other government agencies such as healthcare, disability compensation, education, employment, and financial assistance. Provides additional support services like job finding assistance, Medicare information and counseling, transportation to medical appointments, emergency financial grants, support groups, volunteer opportunities, advocacy, and more. 100 SW Main Street Room 212a Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans or dependents of veterans, with a focus on those with disabilities Hours: -National Call Center: 6am-1pm -Local Office Phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-3:30pm, Wednesday 8am-noon -Local Office Walk in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-2:30pm, Wednesday 8am-noon Email (503) 412-4750 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HARNEY COUNTY HARNEY HUB SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by County Email (503) 945-5600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE PROGRAM SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling and assistance through a state office helpline or a one-on-one telephone appointment with a trained SHIBA volunteer to help select a Medicare prescription drug plan, compare Medicare Advantage Plans, compare Medicare Supplement Plans, and apply for Medicare Savings Programs, including Extra Help with Medicare Prescription Drug coverage. Provides assistance with reviewing medical bills and filing appeals or complaints. Trained Medicare specialists also act on behalf of the Senior Medicare Patrol (SMP), which helps detect and report Medicare fraud. 500 Summer Street NE E-12 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (800) 722-4134 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES MEDICARE.GOV Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website provides information on all aspects of Medicare, including how to apply, find and compare healthcare providers, make address changes and resolve Medicare card issues, get help with costs, find out how Medicare works with other insurance, and report Medicare fraud. The website also provides information on nursing homes, hospitals, home health services, and medical equipment suppliers. Phone line assists with Medicare billing questions and questions about claims, records, and expenses. 7500 Security Boulevard Baltimore, MD 21244 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 633-4227 - 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects older adults with services that allow them to remain safely in their homes and communities (elder law, home maintenance and minor repair services, housekeeping assistance, Medicare counseling, housing information and referral, advocacy, and senior ride program). Services include Oregon Project Independence Services (OPI) and community resources. Additionally offers short-term case management (Options Counseling) and chronic disease management. 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Age 60 and older with a focus on the African-American community Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY, AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 5240 NE Elam Young
